properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of all my faults and my failures When I consider all the times I've let God down I am humbled by the grace He has extended I'm amazed at the mercy I have found

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could never earn His love on my own Yet every time I come before His throne

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stand redeemed by the blood of the lamb I stand redeemed before the great I am When He looks at me, He sees the nail pierced hands That bought my liberty I stand redeemed

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even at my best I am unworthy I have nothing precious I can give A broken life is all I have to offer And yet its a priceless gift to Him

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The bitter mark of sin will never fade away But I can come before; Him unashamed
